snippets.description: CommitSchema commits a new schema revision to an existing schema.
snippets.title: pubsub CommitSchema Sample

snippets.description: CreateSchema creates a schema.
snippets.title: pubsub CreateSchema Sample

snippets.description: DeleteSchema deletes a schema.
snippets.title: pubsub DeleteSchema Sample

snippets.description: DeleteSchemaRevision deletes a specific schema revision.
snippets.title: pubsub DeleteSchemaRevision Sample

snippets.description:
GetIamPolicy gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy
if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.
snippets.title: pubsub GetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: GetSchema gets a schema.
snippets.title: pubsub GetSchema Sample

snippets.description: ListSchemaRevisions lists all schema revisions for the named schema.
snippets.title: pubsub ListSchemaRevisions Sample

snippets.description: ListSchemas lists schemas in a project.
snippets.title: pubsub ListSchemas Sample

snippets.description: RollbackSchema creates a new schema revision that is a copy of the provided revision_id.
snippets.title: pubsub RollbackSchema Sample

snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces
any existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED`
errors.
snippets.title: pubsub SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the
resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building
permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization
checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
snippets.title: pubsub TestIamPermissions Sample

snippets.description: ValidateMessage validates a message against a schema.
snippets.title: pubsub ValidateMessage Sample

snippets.description: ValidateSchema validates a schema.
snippets.title: pubsub ValidateSchema Sample

snippets.description:
Acknowledge acknowledges the messages associated with the `ack_ids` in the
`AcknowledgeRequest`. The Pub/Sub system can remove the relevant messages
from the subscription.

Acknowledging a message whose ack deadline has expired may succeed,
but such a message may be redelivered later. Acknowledging a message more
than once will not result in an error.
snippets.title: pubsub Acknowledge Sample

snippets.description:
CreateSnapshot creates a snapshot from the requested subscription. Snapshots are used in
[Seek](https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations,
which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can
set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the
state captured by a snapshot.
If the snapshot already exists, returns `ALREADY_EXISTS`.
If the requested subscription doesn't exist, returns `NOT_FOUND`.
If the backlog in the subscription is too old -- and the resulting snapshot
would expire in less than 1 hour -- then `FAILED_PRECONDITION` is returned.
See also the `Snapshot.expire_time` field. If the name is not provided in
the request, the server will assign a random
name for this snapshot on the same project as the subscription, conforming
to the [resource name format]
(https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/pubsub-basics#resource_names). The
generated name is populated in the returned Snapshot object. Note that for
REST API requests, you must specify a name in the request.
snippets.title: pubsub CreateSnapshot Sample

snippets.description:
CreateSubscription creates a subscription to a given topic. See the [resource name rules]
(https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/pubsub-basics#resource_names).
If the subscription already exists, returns `ALREADY_EXISTS`.
If the corresponding topic doesn't exist, returns `NOT_FOUND`.

If the name is not provided in the request, the server will assign a random
name for this subscription on the same project as the topic, conforming
to the [resource name format]
(https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/pubsub-basics#resource_names). The
generated name is populated in the returned Subscription object. Note that
for REST API requests, you must specify a name in the request.
snippets.title: pubsub CreateSubscription Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteSnapshot removes an existing snapshot. Snapshots are used in [Seek]
(https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which
allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set
the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the
state captured by a snapshot.
When the snapshot is deleted, all messages retained in the snapshot
are immediately dropped. After a snapshot is deleted, a new one may be
created with the same name, but the new one has no association with the old
snapshot or its subscription, unless the same subscription is specified.
snippets.title: pubsub DeleteSnapshot Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteSubscription deletes an existing subscription. All messages retained in the subscription
are immediately dropped. Calls to `Pull` after deletion will return
`NOT_FOUND`. After a subscription is deleted, a new one may be created with
the same name, but the new one has no association with the old
subscription or its topic unless the same topic is specified.
snippets.title: pubsub DeleteSubscription Sample

snippets.description:
GetIamPolicy gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy
if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.
snippets.title: pubsub GetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
GetSnapshot gets the configuration details of a snapshot. Snapshots are used in
[Seek](https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations,
which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can
set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the
state captured by a snapshot.
snippets.title: pubsub GetSnapshot Sample

snippets.description: GetSubscription gets the configuration details of a subscription.
snippets.title: pubsub GetSubscription Sample

snippets.description:
ListSnapshots lists the existing snapshots. Snapshots are used in [Seek](
https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which
allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set
the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the
state captured by a snapshot.
snippets.title: pubsub ListSnapshots Sample

snippets.description: ListSubscriptions lists matching subscriptions.
snippets.title: pubsub ListSubscriptions Sample

snippets.description:
ModifyAckDeadline modifies the ack deadline for a specific message. This method is useful
to indicate that more time is needed to process a message by the
subscriber, or to make the message available for redelivery if the
processing was interrupted. Note that this does not modify the
subscription-level `ackDeadlineSeconds` used for subsequent messages.
snippets.title: pubsub ModifyAckDeadline Sample

snippets.description:
ModifyPushConfig modifies the `PushConfig` for a specified subscription.

This may be used to change a push subscription to a pull one (signified by
an empty `PushConfig`) or vice versa, or change the endpoint URL and other
attributes of a push subscription. Messages will accumulate for delivery
continuously through the call regardless of changes to the `PushConfig`.
snippets.title: pubsub ModifyPushConfig Sample

snippets.description: Pull pulls messages from the server.
snippets.title: pubsub Pull Sample

snippets.description:
Seek seeks an existing subscription to a point in time or to a given snapshot,
whichever is provided in the request. Snapshots are used in [Seek]
(https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which
allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set
the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the
state captured by a snapshot. Note that both the subscription and the
snapshot must be on the same topic.
snippets.title: pubsub Seek Sample

snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces
any existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED`
errors.
snippets.title: pubsub SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
StreamingPull establishes a stream with the server, which sends messages down to the
client. The client streams acknowledgments and ack deadline modifications
back to the server. The server will close the stream and return the status
on any error. The server may close the stream with status `UNAVAILABLE` to
reassign server-side resources, in which case, the client should
re-establish the stream. Flow control can be achieved by configuring the
underlying RPC channel.


This method is not supported for the REST transport.
snippets.title: pubsub StreamingPull Sample

snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the
resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building
permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization
checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
snippets.title: pubsub TestIamPermissions Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateSnapshot updates an existing snapshot by updating the fields specified in the update
mask. Snapshots are used in
[Seek](https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations,
which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can
set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the
state captured by a snapshot.
snippets.title: pubsub UpdateSnapshot Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateSubscription updates an existing subscription by updating the fields specified in the
update mask. Note that certain properties of a subscription, such as its
topic, are not modifiable.
snippets.title: pubsub UpdateSubscription Sample

snippets.description:
CreateTopic creates the given topic with the given name. See the [resource name rules]
(https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/pubsub-basics#resource_names).
snippets.title: pubsub CreateTopic Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteTopic deletes the topic with the given name. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the topic
does not exist. After a topic is deleted, a new topic may be created with
the same name; this is an entirely new topic with none of the old
configuration or subscriptions. Existing subscriptions to this topic are
not deleted, but their `topic` field is set to `_deleted-topic_`.
snippets.title: pubsub DeleteTopic Sample

snippets.description:
DetachSubscription detaches a subscription from this topic. All messages retained in the
subscription are dropped. Subsequent `Pull` and `StreamingPull` requests
will return FAILED_PRECONDITION. If the subscription is a push
subscription, pushes to the endpoint will stop.
snippets.title: pubsub DetachSubscription Sample

snippets.description:
GetIamPolicy gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy
if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.
snippets.title: pubsub GetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: GetTopic gets the configuration of a topic.
snippets.title: pubsub GetTopic Sample

snippets.description:
ListTopicSnapshots lists the names of the snapshots on this topic. Snapshots are used in
[Seek](https: //cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations,
which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can
set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the
state captured by a snapshot.
snippets.title: pubsub ListTopicSnapshots Sample

snippets.description: ListTopicSubscriptions lists the names of the attached subscriptions on this topic.
snippets.title: pubsub ListTopicSubscriptions Sample

snippets.description: ListTopics lists matching topics.
snippets.title: pubsub ListTopics Sample

snippets.description:
Publish adds one or more messages to the topic. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the topic
does not exist.
snippets.title: pubsub Publish Sample

snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces
any existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED`
errors.
snippets.title: pubsub SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the
resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building
permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization
checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
snippets.title: pubsub TestIamPermissions Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateTopic updates an existing topic by updating the fields specified in the update
mask. Note that certain properties of a topic are not modifiable.
snippets.title: pubsub UpdateTopic Sample
